description: Python application where yaml.load() is called transitively through a config module imported by main.py, triggering CVE-2020-1747.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: main.py calls config.load_config() which internally calls yaml.load(f) without SafeLoader, making the vulnerability reachable transitively.

findings.human_justification: yaml.load() is called in config.py which is imported and invoked by main.py, making the vulnerable function reachable through a transitive call chain.
